summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for Apple-inspired homepage redesign. All 14 test cases passed on both desktop (1920px) and mobile (375px) viewports. Homepage loads correctly with all sections rendering as expected.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly at / route on desktop (1920px) - no blank page
Hero section renders with 'Jolly's Kafe.' heading, subtitle, and two CTA buttons (View Menu, Order Online)
Menu bento grid renders 6 food category cards with images and glass labels (full-english, chicken-burger, sunday-roast, toasted-teacake, cafe-specials, hot-drinks)
Why Jolly's section renders 4 features (Expert Chefs, Fresh Ingredients, Fast Service, Made with Love) with icons
Stats section shows 5 Locations, 50+ Menu Items, 10K+ Happy Customers, 5★ Average Rating
Testimonials section auto-rotates (verified rotation after 6 seconds) and shows quotes with author names
Newsletter section has email input and Subscribe button inside rounded gray container
Footer renders with Explore, Locations, and Connect columns
Homepage loads correctly on mobile (375px) - all sections stack vertically, no horizontal overflow
Hero CTA buttons stack vertically on mobile
Bento grid cards stack to single column on mobile
Newsletter input and button stack on mobile
context_for_next_testing_agent: Apple-inspired homepage redesign testing completed. All sections verified: (1) Hero with Outfit font, 'Jolly's Kafe.' heading, subtitle, and two CTA buttons, (2) Menu bento grid with 6 cards and glass-morphism labels, (3) Why Jolly's section with 4 icon features, (4) Stats section with 5 Locations/50+ Menu Items/10K+ Happy Customers/5★ Average Rating, (5) Testimonials with auto-rotation every 5 seconds and clickable dots, (6) Newsletter in rounded gray container, (7) Footer with Explore/Locations/Connect columns. Mobile responsiveness verified at 375px - all elements stack correctly with no horizontal overflow.
